2026-06-1282026GAC, ITCanada–Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement Implementation ActOrder Fixing the Day of Entry into Force of the Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement between Canada and Indonesia as the Day on Which the Canada–Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement Implementation Act Comes into Force Order fixing the day of entry into force of the Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement between Canada and Indonesia (CEPA) as the day on which the Canada–Indonesia CEPA implementation act comes into force.N/A
act: Canada–Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement Implementation Act
subject: Order Fixing the Day of Entry into Force of the Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement between Canada and Indonesia as the Day on Which the Canada–Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement Implementation Act Comes into Force
precis: Order fixing the day of entry into force of the Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement between Canada and Indonesia (CEPA) as the day on which the Canada–Indonesia CEPA implementation act comes into force.
